module_info.docstring:
Domain Intelligence — Passive OSINT via Python stdlib.

Usage:
    python domain_intel.py subdomains example.com
    python domain_intel.py ssl example.com
    python domain_intel.py whois example.com
    python domain_intel.py dns example.com
    python domain_intel.py available example.com
    python domain_intel.py bulk example.com github.com google.com --checks ssl,dns

All output is structured JSON. No dependencies beyond Python stdlib.
Works on Linux, macOS, and Windows.

functions.name: subdomains
functions.docstring: Find subdomains via Certificate Transparency logs.

functions.name: check_ssl
functions.docstring: Inspect the TLS certificate of a host.

functions.name: whois_lookup
functions.docstring: Query WHOIS servers for domain registration info.

functions.name: dns_records
functions.docstring: Resolve DNS records using system DNS + Google DoH.

functions.name: check_available
functions.docstring: Check domain availability using passive signals (DNS + WHOIS + SSL).

functions.name: bulk_check
functions.docstring: Run multiple checks across multiple domains in parallel.
